title: Production incident briefing
prompt: Prepare the incident briefing from live operations tools. Return only the requested JSON final answer.
task_description: Find the active payments incident, confirm customer impact, correlate the current error spike, identify the runbook and owner, and return a concise executive briefing. The briefing must explicitly include incidentId, severity, service, impactedRegions, affectedEnterpriseAccounts, rootCause, runbook, and owner.
fuzzy_description: This mimics a real on-call workflow with overlapping incident, observability, customer, chat, docs, and time tools. Ignore resolved incidents, stale Slack chatter, and unrelated checkout noise.

requires: confirm owner and runbook from operational notes

title: Release risk triage
prompt: Decide whether the current release should ship. Return only the requested JSON final answer.
task_description: Combine deployment state, GitHub changes, Jira blockers, feature flag status, observability risk, and release docs to decide whether the payments release can proceed.
fuzzy_description: The agent must work through a large tool stack with many tempting but irrelevant list/search/get tools. The right answer requires cross-checking release metadata, source changes, tickets, flags, telemetry, and rollback guidance.

title: Enterprise renewal readiness
prompt: Prepare the renewal readiness summary. Return only the requested JSON final answer.
task_description: For the largest upcoming enterprise renewal, combine CRM-like customer data, local SQL records, Slack notes, Jira blockers, memory facts, and docs to identify risk and the next action.
fuzzy_description: This task is intentionally not a coding task. It mirrors account-readiness work across several backend MCP tools with noisy search/list/read operations and duplicated names.

title: On-call handoff synthesis
prompt: Write the next-shift handoff from the available MCP tools. Return only the requested JSON final answer.
task_description: Synthesize repo, filesystem, GitHub, observability, incident, deployment, and time evidence into a handoff for the next on-call shift.
fuzzy_description: This is a long-horizon agent-style workflow compressed into an eval: browse local operational files, inspect source-control state, correlate active incidents and telemetry, and identify concrete risk items without using shell or repo inspection outside MCP.
